details.name: Test 6 - Regression Validation
details.regression_result: Next version installed successfully on Arm64
details.comparison: Current pinned Paddle-Lite release 2.11 passed smoke tests in this run. Regression validation installed the official Linux Arm64 archive for candidate release 2.12, verified the shared library is AArch64, and compiled plus ran a real C++ smoke program against the candidate library. Paddle-Lite does not expose a standalone Linux version banner for this archive, so the installed version is tracked from the validated release asset.
